visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor home setting. A woman with a ponytail and a young girl with braided hair sit at a small white circular table. The girl holds a pink ball. The lighting is bright and warm. (2) Close-up shots of the girl as she speaks. Visual graphics of a steak and a hamburger appear next to her with text labels. (3) The woman faces the camera, holding a modern smartphone. She demonstrates an app on the screen, which shows various UI elements with colorful icons and Chinese text. (4) Screen recording sequence showing the app's AI conversation modes. The woman's hands are visible interacting with the smartphone screen. (5) The woman is shown in a living room, carrying various plush toys while talking, illustrating a busy mother's daily life. She looks slightly stressed then smiles as she refers to the phone. (6) More screen captures detail the app's feedback system, highlighting grammar corrections and customized study plans with green and red text markers. (7) Final sequence where the woman stands in a bright room, holds the phone up towards the camera, and gestures enthusiastically. Promotional text overlays appear on the screen. (8) The video ends with the little girl waving a yellow plush toy, smiling brightly at the camera in a close-up shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸 咪咪 晚餐時間到了 你要吃什麼? (2) [Variety]: steak. [Variety]: hamburger. (3) [Subtitle]: 喔!! 爸爸教你的嗎? (4) [Subtitle]: 不是 我是學姨的. (5) [Subtitle]: 姨~ 我有聽到你在講英文. (6) [Subtitle]: 對啦~ 這是我最近的新發現. [Slogan]: Speak AI 英文口說 App. (7) [Subtitle]: 身為職業媽媽呢 你有時候要用英文講電話 還是要教小朋友作業. [Variety]: 平常真的沒時間補習耶. (8) [Subtitle]: 有時後要跟國外開會的時候 自我介紹都要用英文. [Variety]: 英文太久沒講 就會卡住 很丟臉呢. (9) [Slogan]: 自由設定 AI 對話情境. [Slogan]: 跟老闆的英文簡報. [Slogan]: 跨國會議. [Slogan]: 模擬雅思. [Slogan]: 外籍老師開家長會. (10) [Slogan]: 文法用字句型的建議. [Variety]: 介係詞 on / in / at. (11) [Slogan]: 安排客製化的複習課程. (12) [Slogan]: 隨時隨地用 Speak 練習口說!. (13) [Slogan]: 訂閱年度會員 還有最高 $777 的折扣 只到 6/20. (14) [Slogan]: Speak 讓英文一切好說.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an adult woman with her dark hair tied in a ponytail, wearing a grey button-down shirt over a dark top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a minimalist indoor home environment with a pink sofa, a white shelf with various cute plush toys (a cloud, a rainbow, a dinosaur), and a grey sofa in a distant room.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Clear, natural dialogue between an adult female and a young girl. The female's voice is warm and inquisitive, while the child's voice is high-pitched and joyful. Ambient room tone is quiet. (2) A bright, upbeat acoustic-pop background music (BGM) fades in as the adult female begins a professional narrative. The music has a steady, moderate tempo with light percussion and bright guitar strums. (3) Digital UI sound effects like clicks and pings trigger as the app features are mentioned on screen. The woman's vocal delivery becomes more energized and rhythmic, maintaining a high clarity level. (4) The BGM continues consistently while the woman explains the app's specific benefits and user scenarios. Her speech rate is moderate-fast, well-articulated, and has high positive valence. (5) A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound occurs during scene changes to different environments. The woman's voice remains the dominant signal with a friendly, authoritative tone. (6) The video concludes with the BGM fading out to emphasize a final playful vocal from the child singing a happy tune with extremely high arousal and excitement.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem/User Persona -> Solution/Product Introduction -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for the 'Speak AI' English learning app. It uses a relatable 'busy working mom' hook to demonstrate how the app's AI conversation and feedback features can help users practice English speaking effectively during short gaps of free time.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly introduces and demonstrates the 'Speak' app, showing its UI and explaining its benefits followed by a discount code.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media promotional content using family interaction as an emotional hook before transitioning into technical product demonstrations.
